title: Incorrect warning "Unsupported: randomizing this expression, treating as state"

features.name: randomize with inside constraint using parameter array
features.description: Code should include a call to randomize() with an inside constraint that uses a parameter array as the set

features.name: inside operator with unpacked array operand
features.description: Code should include an inside operator whose set operand is an unpacked parameter array

features.name: randomize result assignment to int variable
features.description: Code should include assigning the result of a randomize() call with constraints to an integer variable
